items.name: Veg Samosa (2 pcs)
items.description: Homemade pastry filled with spiced potato, green peas and exotic spices, fried crisp, served with tomato chutney.

items.name: Crispy Potato Bites
items.description: Deep-fried battered potato served with tomato chutney.

items.name: Aloo Sadaeko
items.description: Potato seasoned with homemade Nepali sauce and spices.

items.name: Chatpatey
items.description: Puffed rice mixed with boiled potato, peas, chillies, fresh coriander and spices.

items.name: Spicy Potato
items.description: Roasted potatoes sauteed with chilli garlic and Nepali spices.

items.name: Pani Puri (10 pcs)
items.description: Crispy hollow balls with spiced potato, onion filling, served with sour and spice flavoured water.

items.name: Wai-Wai Sadaeko
items.description: Nepali noodles mixed with boiled potato, peas, chillies and fresh coriander with spices.

items.name: Crispy Paneer Bites
items.description: Battered and deep-fried marinated cottage cheese served with tomato chutney.

items.name: Bhatmas Sadaeko (Fried Soybeans)
items.description: Crunchy soybeans seasoned with ginger, coriander, onions and chillies.

items.name: Chicken Sausage (3 pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried sausage served with tomato chutney and chilli sauce.

items.name: Chicken Lollipop (5 pcs)
items.description: Battered and fried marinated chicken lollipops served with homemade chutney and chilli sauce.

items.name: Shabhale (2 pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried spiced chicken mince wrapped in pastry served with homemade chutney and chilli spice.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Bites
items.description: Juicy chunks of chicken marinated with Nepalese spices.

items.name: Veg Khaja Set
items.description: Platter served with fried beaten rice, Nepali mixed pickles, aloo sadaeko with selroti, samosa and potato pea curry.

items.name: Samosa Pea Curry
items.description: 2 crispy and flavorful samosas served with potato pea curry, Nepali mixed pickles, fried beaten rice, bhatmas sadaeko and aloo sadaeko.

items.name: Selroti Set
items.description: 2 homemade selroti served with potato pea curry, Nepali mixed pickles, fried beaten rice, bhatmas sadaeko and aloo sadaeko.

items.name: Chicken Choila Set
items.description: Spicy marinated grilled chicken choila served with beaten rice, Nepali mixed pickles, bhatmas sadaeko and aloo sadaeko.

items.name: Chicken Khaja Set
items.description: Platter served with fried beaten rice, Nepali mixed pickles, aloo sadaeko, chicken choila, 1 piece of selroti and bhatmas sadaeko.

items.name: Mutton (Goat) Sekuwa Set
items.description: Marinated grilled goat boneless served with beaten rice, Nepali mixed pickles and aloo sadaeko.

items.name: Pork Sekuwa Set
items.description: Roasted boneless marinated pork served with beaten rice, Nepali mixed pickles and aloo sadaeko.

items.name: Paneer Chilli
items.description: Sauteed with a homemade chilli sauce, fresh vegetables and your choice of filling.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Stir-fried noodles with cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, green peas, herbs and spices, and your choice of meat.

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Stir-fried rice with mixed vegetables, egg and your choice of meat.

items.name: Thukpa
items.description: A comforting noodle soup loaded with mixed vegetables, paneer or meat, seasoned with Nepali spices.

items.name: Nepali Thali Set
items.description: A traditional Nepali platter: steamed rice, lentil soup, vegetable curry, sauteed greens, crispy papad, pickles, sweet dessert and your choice of curry.

items.name: Nepalese Curry
items.description: A flavourful curry made with a blend of traditional Nepalese spices and your choice of meat, vegetables or paneer.

items.name: Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)
items.description: Deep-fried reduced milk dumplings soaked in sugar syrup, flavoured with cardamom, and yogurt.

items.name: Rasgulla (2 pcs)
items.description: Soft and spongy cottage cheese balls soaked in sugar syrup, a classic sweet with yogurt.

items.name: Kulfi
items.description: Traditional Nepalese frozen dessert similar to ice cream, flavoured with cardamom and pistachios.
